previous_fixes_applied: FST-0001: Mission checker encoding (UTF-8 vs cp1252) — FIXED
FST-0004: ResumeProgressCard not shown — FIXED (simplified restore flow)
FST-0005: Quiz answer no visible feedback — FIXED (visual state indicators)
FST-0006: Duplicate CTA confusion — FIXED (bottom CTA text changed)
FST-0007: Cross-browser analytics aggregation — FIXED (backend analytics endpoints)

issues.description: Playwright E2E tests BPERS-002, PERS-002, PERS-009 fail when backend server is not running. These tests require backend on port 8000 for cross-device restore verification and mission stats tracking. Failures are environment-related (backend not available), not product bugs.
issues.evidence: 3/29 Playwright tests fail with ECONNREFUSED on port 8000. 13 non-backend tests all pass cleanly. Backend pytest suite (15 tests) passes 100%. Frontend build and TypeScript compile clean.
issues.note: Tests that require backend should either auto-start it or be skipped when unavailable. Not a product blocker.

issues.description: Analytics export endpoint (GET /analytics/export) uses server-local storage (list in memory). Events are not persisted across server restarts. Restarting the server loses all analytics data until new events are collected.
issues.evidence: After backend restart, GET /analytics/export returns empty events list. This is acceptable for controlled beta but would be problematic for long-running or production analytics.
issues.note: For controlled beta, one-shot session analytics are sufficient. For commercial beta, persistent analytics storage (e.g., Turso) would be needed.

issues.description: Analytics events from frontend (localStorage) and backend (POST /analytics/events, GET /analytics/export) are separate systems. There is no automated reconciliation between frontend and backend analytics. Operator must manually compare both sources.
issues.evidence: Frontend analytics stored in localStorage key pq_analytics_events with batch sync to backend. No single dashboard showing unified analytics view.
issues.note: Unified analytics view would improve operator experience for commercial beta. Not needed for controlled beta scope.

issues.description: Windows port binding issue: ports 8000 and 8766 intermittently unavailable due to Windows reserved port range or firewall rules. Backend had to be started on port 54321 for testing.
issues.evidence: uvicorn on ports 8000 and 8080 failed with 'access denied' (WinError 10013). Ports were free according to netstat. Higher port (54321) worked immediately.
issues.note: This is a developer environment issue. Production deployment on Vercel would not have this problem.

issues.description: Windows cp1252 encoding issue when printing emoji/log symbols from Python scripts. PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 is required for readable terminal output on Windows.
issues.evidence: wider_beta_simulation.py crashed on first run with UnicodeEncodeError on emoji characters (✅). Workaround: set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8.
issues.note: Developer environment issue. All product code (mission.py, backend) already has UTF-8 encoding fixes applied (FST-0001).

verdict: No critical or major blockers found in wider beta. All 5 issues are minor or polish. Product is stable at 50 participants. All FST blockers remain fixed.
